narrative:
Colerain V (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,173 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
